title: TecHive
description: 🍯Tecno-stiled texture pack for bees and hives!🍯
body:
### ABOUT
TecHive is a texture pack that replaces the vanilla textures of the hive, bee nest, bees themselves, as well as honeycombs and bottles of honey with their technologically advanced versions. There are plans to create technical texture packs for other mobs. It's a technological revolution, baby (bzzz)!

### USAGE
Sure, but give credit by name and link to this project.

### NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED

_Thanks, and bee fun!_
